project_type: Monorepo; 7 apps already on Next.js App Router, 6 on dead React pages/
verification_instructions: Each migrated app must `next build` successfully and run via `next dev`. typecheck + build stay green.
setup_instructions: pnpm install. Reference the working Next App Router apps (quantmail, quantchat, quantai) and PR #109's QuantSync migration.
environment_constraints: Use Next.js 15.5 + React 19 to match the rest of the repo. Reuse @quant/shared-ui components and @quant/brand. Keep the Fastify backend per app; frontend talks to it via src/app/api proxy + env *_BACKEND_URL (Phase 83 FEAT-003).
key_patterns: App Router migration pattern (per PR #109 QuantSync): add next + react + @tanstack/react-query + framer-motion deps; create src/app/layout.tsx with ThemeProvider + CommandPalette (Cmd+K); convert each src/pages/*.tsx into src/app/<route>/page.tsx; rename old src/pages/ to src/legacy-pages/ during transition; set build script to `next build`, dev to `next dev`.
directory_structure: Each of the 6 apps has a real Fastify backend (apps/<app>/backend) and a dead React frontend (apps/<app>/src/pages). Target: src/app/ App Router. mock-debt.csv enumerates the mock screens per app.
